substep.title: Compose the Research Document
substep.action:
Synthesize the children's findings into the extern research document per references/extern-catalog.md research-document schema: Research Question, Key Findings (with clone-relative file:line references and code examples), Applicable Patterns, References.
Applicable Patterns is a FACTUAL transfer assessment — what matches our work, what differs — not a recommendation to adopt. If the studied pattern was not present in the repo, say so plainly; a negative finding is still a study result.

check.template-output:
Present the drafted findings for review before persistence.
[a] Revise (study another component, sharpen a finding) [c] Continue to persistence [y] YOLO

substep.title: Persist to the Global Store
substep.action: Resolve the global extern store path (catalog.py resolves it from thoughts config). Write the document to repos/{org-repo}/{YYYY-MM-DD}_{topic-slug}.md in the global store.

substep.title: Record the Study in the Catalog
substep.action:
Update the catalog through the script — never hand-edit it:
uv run {base_dir}/scripts/catalog.py add-study \ --repo "{org/repo}" \ --url "{url}" \ --topic "{topic}" \ --document "repos/{org-repo}/{file}.md" \ --context "{why this was studied}"
Then run `thoughts sync` so the global store is indexed.
